senses.gloss: to give up, renounce, resign, waive, forgo, yield, surrender, abandon, relinquish [+عَنْ (object)] in favour of
to leave, assign, transfer, make over [+عَنْ (object)] to
to lower oneself, condescend, stoop, deign, dismount
to lay down, resign, abdicate [+عَنْ (object)] in favour of
to show oneself obliging, conciliatory, yielding, condescending
to alight, to fight each other
